notes: Anchore's open-source CLI that generates a Software Bill of Materials from container images and filesystems, and the SBOM feeder for its vulnerability scanner Grype. Anchore's own docs gloss it "pronounced like sift" — one syllable, exactly like the verb. The y trips people up because sibling tool Grype takes the other y sound and rhymes with hype, so readers guess "SYE-ft".
